hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'DROP '*|*'drop '*|*'TRUNCATE '*|*'truncate '*|*'DELETE FROM'*|*'delete from'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive SQL operation detected. Use a migration instead.' >&2; exit 2;; *'rm -rf'*|*'rm -r /'*|*'rm -r '*|*'rm -fr'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Recursive delete detected. Be more specific.' >&2; exit 2;; *'git push --force'*|*'git push -f '*|*'git push -f'|*'git reset --hard'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive git operation detected. Confirm with user first.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
